title: Web APIs
summary: Browser APIs: localStorage, geolocation, and the Fetch API.

examples.title: localStorage
examples.description: Save, load, and clear a username in the browser. Run inside the preview.

examples.title: Geolocation API
examples.description: Get latitude and longitude when the user clicks the button (browser will ask permission).

examples.title: Fetch-style data (inline)
examples.description: Simulate loading JSON and rendering a list (no network required).

practice.description: Store a theme preference ("light" or "dark") in localStorage and apply a background when the page loads.

starter.html:
<button id="save">Save dark theme</button>
<button id="load">Apply saved theme</button>

hints: JSON.stringify not needed for a simple string
